title: Aditya Birla Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Aditya Birla Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Aditya Birla Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aditya Birla Finance:
Aditya Birla Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance!
